details: The agent successfully navigated to https://github.com/facebook/react/issues using browser automation tools, extracted real data from the page snapshot, and reported: 825 total open issues (shown as 'Open (825)' on the page), and the 5 most recent issues with specific titles including #36226 'nevidimka,qwe', #36218 '[Compiler Bug]: Uncaught SyntaxError...', #36217 '[Compiler Bug]: Todo: (CodegenReactiveFunction...)...', #36211 'Bug:', and #36206 'Bug:'. The titles are real GitHub issue titles (not hallucinated), the issue count of 825 is in the hundreds as expected, and the agent correctly noted that some titles appeared truncated. The agent actually browsed the page and extracted authentic data.
